desc: Provide comments for work objects. Apps call this endpoint to send per-user flexpane comment data to the client.

comments.desc: Array of comments to present to the user. See the [comment schema](/messaging/work-objects-comments#entity-present-comments-method) for the full list of properties.

cursor.desc: App supplied cursor used for pagination, will be sent in the next request for comments

can_post_comment.desc: Indicates whether the user has permissions to post comments

trigger_id.desc: A reference to the original user action that initiated the request

delete_action_id.desc: The block action id that will be sent when a delete request is initiated for a comment.

user_auth_required.desc: Set to true (or 1) to indicate that the user must authenticate to see the comments data.

user_auth_url.desc: A custom URL to which users are directed for authentication if required.

method_not_found.desc: when the API isn't available to the caller

invalid_app_id.desc: App ID is not a valid format

user_auth_url_missing.desc: User auth url is required if user_auth_required is true

missing_delete_action_id.desc: delete_action_id is required when any comment is marked can_delete
